title: Equi-height histogram always estimate non-integral equality predicate to 1/rows
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (c1 INT NOT NULL, c2 DOUBLE DEFAULT NULL, c3 VARCHAR(50));
CREATE TABLE t2 (c1 DOUBLE NOT NULL, c2 INT DEFAULT 0);
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE c2 IS NULL OR c2 = 2.0;
key_bug_features: Equi-height histogram estimates selectivity incorrectly for equality predicates.
